import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Brain, Users, FileText, TrendingUp, Award, ChevronRight, Target, BarChart3, GraduationCap, Shield, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; function LandingPage() { const features = [ { icon: Brain, title: 'AI-Powered Classification', description: 'Machine learning models analyze OJT records to predict PQF levels with high accuracy.' }, { icon: Users, title: 'Student Management', description: 'Easily manage student profiles, track progress, and organize training records.' }, { icon: FileText, title: 'Accomplishment Tracking', description: 'Log weekly OJT activities, skills developed, and hours completed.' }, { icon: TrendingUp, title: 'Progress Analytics', description: 'Visualize training progress and PQF level predictions over time.' } ]; const pqfLevels = [ { level: 1, description: 'Routine, repetitive, and predictable activities' }, { level: 2, description: 'Familiar and non-familiar contexts' }, { level: 3, description: 'Diverse, unfamiliar, and changing contexts' }, { level: 4, description: 'Complex, non-routine activities' }, { level: 5, description: 'Specialized, complex, and professional work' }, { level: 6, description: 'Advanced professional or highly specialized work' }, { level: 7, description: 'Highly advanced, specialized, and complex work' }, ]; return (
